title: BACAP: New Horizons
description: An unofficial addon for the BlazeandCaves Advancements Pack.
body:
BACAP: New Horizons is an addon datapack for BlazeAndCave's Advancement Pack, which adds 119 new advancements on top of the pack!

This datapack is a merge of 2 ideas (Ashley's Edition and Collecting Havoc Edition), coded by AshleyDiesAlone and Honestlytzadok, bugfixed by CoolgirlΩ.

Huge props to the creators of the original pack, CoolgirlΩ, Elag, FixingGlobe, and everyone who gave feedback on the pack's Progress updates.

Link for a REQUIRED datapack for this to run properly: (original bacap)
https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/blazeandcave-s-advancements-pack-1-12/

New Horizons Official Server
https://discord.gg/k4pkPZv9n
